title: pecluma pilosa
intro: Pecluma pilosa, also known as the velvety air plant, is a type of epiphyte belonging to the Polypodiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pecluma pilosa include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Pecluma pilosa can be prepared as a herbal infusion, decoction, or salve, and is often used topically to treat skin irritations and wounds.
